text: FINAL: Saints 27, Falcons 17. Carr throws for 284 yards and 2 TDs. The Saints are now 6-3 on the season. #WhoDat #Saints
BOX SCORE: Braves 8, Marlins 2. Acuna Jr. goes 3-for-4 with a homer and 3 RBI. Atlanta now leads the NL East by 4.5 games. #ForTheA
BREAKING: Biloxi City Council approves $4.2M in road repairs for Back Bay area. Work to begin this summer. Full story at sunherald.com
The secret to tight dovetail joints: go slow with your marking gauge and let the chisel do the work on the baseline. Don't rush the chop.
Ole Miss football spring game recap: Rebels look sharp in Grove Bowl scrimmage. QB battle heating up. #HottyToddy
Saints draft grade: A-. New offensive lineman in round 1 was a steal. This team is building something special. #WhoDat #NFLDraft
Braves walk-off! Olson singles in the 10th to beat the Mets 4-3. Atlanta winning streak now at 6 games. #ChopOn #ForTheA
Flooding reported on Highway 90 near Biloxi Beach after overnight rain. City crews are on scene. Avoid the area if possible.
New video: building a classic Shaker end table start to finish. Hand-cut mortise and tenon joints. Link in bio. #woodworking #shaker
Biloxi Shuckers host Pensacola Blue Wahoos this weekend at MGM Park. Gates open at 5pm Friday. Full schedule: sunherald.com
2026 Ole Miss football schedule is set. Season opener at home Sept 5 vs Memphis. Kinnick Stadium trip in week 4. #HottyToddy
Asked what wood finish I use most? Tried and true original. No fumes, food safe, looks great on walnut and cherry. #woodworking
FINAL: Braves 5, Phillies 3. Sale goes 7 strong innings, 9 K. Atlanta bullpen holds the lead. #ForTheA
Mississippi legislature passes $120M Gulf Coast infrastructure package. Biloxi, Gulfport and Pascagoula projects included. Full coverage at mississippitoday.org
This month: shop-made router plane from scratch. All you need is a block of hardwood, a blade and a few hours. Plans available free online. #finewoodworking
Saints minicamp opens Monday. Roster battles to watch: backup QB spot, slot corner and the kick return unit. #Saints #WhoDat
Gulf Coast shrimping season opens June 1. Mississippi shrimpers hope for a strong season after last year's shortfalls.
Hand tool tip of the week: flatten your bench plane sole every season. A twisted sole turns a good cut into a mess. Takes 10 minutes with sandpaper on glass.
City of Biloxi: Trash and recycling pickup delayed by one day this week due to Memorial Day. Monday routes run Tuesday, Tuesday runs Wednesday.
Saints sign veteran WR to shore up depth behind their top receivers. One-year prove-it deal. Details via @Saints. #WhoDat
Happy Memorial Day from Gospel Music Channel. Grateful for all who served. Enjoy this Mahalia Jackson classic in their honor.
FINAL: Braves 12, Nationals 1. Duvall crushes 2 homers. Spencer Strider returns from IL and strikes out 11. #ChopOn #ForTheA
New in stores: our summer router bit set, now with carbide-tipped spiral upcut bits. Perfect for cabinet doors and dado work. #woodworking
Gulf Coast beach water quality reports look good heading into summer. Most Biloxi beaches rated safe for swimming. Full report: sunherald.com
Ole Miss lands 4-star LB commit from Hattiesburg. Rebels building depth at linebacker heading into fall. #HottyToddy #RebelRecruiting
